name: Kim - Local Tsundere
description:
ENTER KONAMI CODE

Kim is a girl you wouldn't be sure to approach or not. On one hand, she doesn't seem to like anybody: she's mean, sarcastic and reserved even to her closest friends. But on the other hand, she carries more meat than a whole butcher shop. And why the hell does she always wear the shortest possible miniskirts?

Perhaps, under all that harsh visage, there's a needy girl looking for the proper attention...

...Or perhaps she'd actually rather you dead. That one's most likely.

This bot got 3 different possible starting scenarios:

  1. Kim got sick of her roommates so she asks you to let her stay at your place. Try to be less annoying than them.

  2. Kim's bored as fuck working her shift at the video store. Perfect chance for you to brighten her day.

  3. Kim is about to perform at Sex Bob-omb, but you offered her a handful of cash in exchange of getting a flash of her tits.

I know, I know, she's very overused in j.ai already, but what can I say. Sometimes I break my own rules if the popular character is this pornable.

She was a popular choice at the collage too so I guess this'll blow up a bit. Or maybe not. Anyway, got 34 left.

Spoiler: Vex is coming up now, but I can't figure out what scenario I should give her. Any ideas?

Pfp by Androjuniarto
